(OONP) during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of 
the Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_OONP_COINS_1M 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: Plans that use a co-payment amount rather than a coinsurance percentage will not have a value in this 
field; see instead the corresponding co-payment variable called (PRE_ICL_OONP_COPAY_1M). The 
CCW constructs the Plan Characteristics file from information submitted by Part D plan sponsors
